value.author: codex-pm-ecosystem-audit-20260625
value.text: Read-only taxonomy lane complete. Evidence: AGENTS.md read first; pm inventory paged with pm list --status all over 1,387 items; pm-doxj direct hierarchy inspected; active/stale/metadata filters and targeted pm get reads completed. Findings: 29 active items, all under pm-doxj with no active orphans, missing parents, or active-under-closed-parent cases. Main risks are taxonomy hygiene, not broken topology: stale open audit containers pm-5dbn/pm-srex/pm-b4cp/pm-34gb/pm-lzrq/pm-gpea have zero active descendants; pm-z5nb/pm-28cf/pm-7zs0/pm-96wm need resolved-or-recurring disposition; 24 active items lacked AC before this run; all 29 active items lacked estimate/risk/confidence before this run; validate reports validate_resolution_missing_fields:253 while history drift and health are clean. Recommended creating cleanup/backfill tracking under pm-57vh and closing/repurposing stale audit containers after current evidence is recorded.

value.author: codex-ecosystem-auditor
value.text: Lane closure evidence: taxonomy/hierarchy audit found no active orphan, missing-parent, active-under-closed-parent, dependency-cycle, or parent-cycle blockers. Converted findings into pm-psc0 and pm-e9zh; pm-psc0 is now closed and pm-e9zh remains open for high-quality historical resolution backfill.
